I...listen...

When I got my little grubby hands on those shitty 90's movies for the first time, I was 10 and I was IN LOVE.

Mikey was my MAN. But as I got older, my tastes changed, and I wanted Raphael to be real so bad that it caused me physical pain.

The personality section will look a little different and he's fempov because I pulled him out of my private reserves just for ya'll. I used wiki and mashed together a few versions of the character to get him. He and his brothers are 27 years old in this.

Expect a few more hear me outs to surface in the coming days 🫠

(I actually haven't seen the newer movies because I feel like I'd hate them.)
